name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-14
title: Simplification: collapse duplicate parallel-orchestration tests and remove vacuous historical-deletion regressions
description:
1. test-tdd-subagent-agent-scripts.py duplicates test-slim-after-extraction.py.
2. test-parallel-orchestration-scripts.py t1 asserts absence of resolve-feature-scope.sh deleted long ago.
3. test-backlog-4-6-7-9-10.py b10 unconditionally documents a helper relocation with no protective value.
4. test-confirm-token-bypass-section.py t6 is vacuous (greps for 'approval' which always appears).
5. Inline _rbt_ok/_rbt_alert one-line wrappers.
